title: Low-Cover Bottleneck
strongest_claim: Low cover reduces the band-positive set to 185 cases; interval then reduces it to 66, and deletion to 10.
improved: T305 identifies the sequence of bottlenecks in the finite target.
weakened_or_falsified: It weakens stories centered only on ordering fraction or interval size.
falsification_condition: T305 fails if the bottleneck counts use different parent filters.
claim_ledger_update: Do not update the claim ledger from T305 alone.
open_blocker: The bottleneck still needs a non-ad hoc source.
suggested_next: Compare local T255 behavior against the global bottleneck.
not_claimed: These finite selection audits do not define a physical measure, estimate dimension, prove faithful embedding, validate random sprinkling, derive metric structure, establish a continuum limit, or settle S1.
